accepted_evidence: The versioned project-owned 4x4 atlas cleanly separates twelve individual leaf studies from four tiny three-to-five-leaf twig studies.
The near representation retains all 193536 physically scaled masked cards and 387072 source triangles, including 2.8-5.8 cm single-leaf cards.
The far representation retains all 56448 twig-spray cards and 112896 source triangles with an explicit 28-36 m draw-distance overlap.

The trunk remains Nanite PreserveArea while both masked foliage meshes retain full non-Nanite source geometry after a controlled UE 5.8 comparison proved both Nanite foliage modes visually destructive.
WindIntensity, WindWeight, and WindSpeed remain exposed on the Metal two-sided-foliage material.
The isolated map passes map check with zero errors and warnings, and the 60 m and 150 m captures retain a continuous crown silhouette.

nanite_comparison.scope: UE 5.8 offscreen Metal isolated prototype; re-evaluate if foliage becomes true geometry rather than masked microcards

rejection_reasons: The continuously staggered main branches still read as regular horizontal tiers and retain a conifer-like silhouette instead of an irregular broad coigue crown.
The closeup resolves individual leaves but exposes a volumetric card field without convincing petioles, secondary branchlets, leaf attachment, or coherent twig clusters.
The far representation remains visibly repetitive and must be replaced by several authored branchlet clusters plus a validated runtime LOD or HLOD transition.
Only one open-grown adult form exists; forest-grown adult, intermediate, juvenile, damaged, and deadwood variants remain absent.
No corridor ecology placement, wind-motion capture, guide or ecology review, or measured desktop and VR performance evidence exists.

review_contract.capture_redistribution: not approved; hashes and reproducible paths only are retained in the open-source repository

next_iteration_requirements: Author secondary and tertiary branchlet topology with leaves attached along petioles instead of filling anchor volumes with independent cards.
Create broad irregular open-grown and forest-grown adult crowns plus at least one intermediate form before another corridor comparison.
Replace the far card cloud with several source-matched branchlet clusters and validate cross-fade, wind, shadow, and silhouette through the 28-36 m handoff.
Repeat all five views and require closeup morphology acceptance before ecology placement or corridor promotion.
